candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue figure; clearly labeled and matches total revenue concept.
Finance-related income, not operating revenue; included only as lower-priority candidate if revenue label changed over time.
Interest component of finance income; not core operating revenue but a potential fallback if misclassified in some years.

candidates.row_label: Share of income in associated companies
candidates.why: Equity-accounted income; not revenue but occasional proxy when revenue misclassified, so very low priority.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Earnings measure, not revenue, so conceptually incorrect for REVT.
Comprehensive income measure, not revenue; conceptually incorrect for REVT.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income before minorities; not a revenue measure.
General operating overhead; more consistent with SG&A than direct cost of sales.
Marketing/advertising; part of SG&A, not direct production costs.
Facility-related overhead; could be partially COGS but typically SG&A/overhead.
Overhead travel costs; SG&A rather than direct COGS.
Financial, non-operating; not COGS.
Selling/marketing; SG&A, not COGS.
Facility/operating overhead; more SG&A-like than direct COGS.
Inventory balance, not period expense; cannot directly use as COGS.
Asset; not COGS.
Liability; not specifically cost of sales.
Liability; not specifically cost of sales.

variables.notes: REVIEWED. The provided COGS candidates are mostly SG&A or non-operating items. In this service/project-based business, 'External projects costs' is the most natural match for direct cost of sales (external costs directly tied to projects/revenue). It is not in the candidate list, so it was selected from the full A-column and flagged for manual review. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] External projects costs

candidates.why: Core SG&A personnel costs; classic overhead component.
Bucket of operating overhead expenses; fits SG&A definition (excluding COGS/D&A).
Selling and marketing overhead; directly part of SG&A.
Equity compensation typically included within SG&A; good SG&A component if used.

variables.notes: Multiple component rows are chosen to represent SG&A overhead, excluding totals and non-overhead items.

candidates.why: Amortization of capitalized development; related to R&D but not the current-period research expense itself.
Explicit R&D expense line; best semantic match for XRD.
Net capitalized R&D asset; balance sheet item, not expense.
Gross capitalized R&D asset; balance sheet, not expense.
Accumulated amortization of capitalized R&D; balance sheet, not current expense line.

variables.notes: Uses the explicit Research and Development expense line as XRD; amortization and balance sheet R&D lines are excluded.

candidates.why: Primary interest expense line; best match for recurring interest cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest portion of lease liabilities; a component of total interest expense.
Specific interest on overdrafts; potential component of interest expense.
Attribution of profit to minorities; not interest expense.
Duplicate minority profit allocation; not interest expense.
Minority ownership share of comprehensive income; not interest expense.
Generic interest expense line (may be unused here) but semantically correct as interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest cost; valid secondary source for XINT.
Debt classification, not expense.
Debt balance, not expense.
Debt balance, not expense.
Debt balance, not expense.
Equity for non-controlling interests; not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Multiple interest expense-related rows are provided as a priority list; later processing can pick the first non-missing value per year.

candidates.why: Represents contributed capital only; excludes retained earnings and other equity components, so not full book equity.
Component of paid-in equity; incomplete as total equity measure.
Additional equity component; incomplete on its own.
Represents total equity attributable to owners, with minority interest reported separately, matching BE definition.
Combined equity including minorities; would double count with separate MIB, so not ideal for BE.

variables.notes: Minority interests are reported separately, so Total Equity is taken as equity attributable to owners/parent.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit to minorities; flow, not balance, but confirms presence of minorities.
Duplicate income statement allocation line; also a flow item.
OCI-related attribution to minorities; flow item.
Balance sheet non-controlling interests; correct stock measure for MIB.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Earnings measure before minorities; not the minority equity balance.
Combined equity including minorities; not isolated MIB, and would double-count with BE if used.

variables.notes: Uses the balance sheet Minority Interest line as the non-controlling interests (MIB) stock measure; only one instance is selected to avoid duplication.
